adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: openrouter-1

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your OpenRouter API key from openrouter.ai/keys.

model.title: Model
model.description: The model slug as listed on openrouter.ai/models. Examples: openai/gpt-4o, anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: OpenRouter endpoint. Pre-filled with the default; change only if OpenRouter moves the base URL.

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies. Leave it empty to use the provider default. Sent as `max_completion_tokens` when Enable Reasoning is on.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

enable_reasoning.title: Enable Reasoning
enable_reasoning.description: Toggle on for reasoning models to drop `temperature` and send `max_completion_tokens` and `reasoning_effort` via `extra_body` so the upstream API accepts them.

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Sets the reasoning strength when Enable Reasoning is on.
